    homePage:async({ page, baseURL}, use, testInfo) =>{

        await this.page.goto('/opencart/index.php?route=account/login');
    }


    async fill(locator:flexibleLocator, text:string):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator).fill(text, {timeout: this.defaultTimeOut});
        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);

        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


        const homePage=await loginPage.doLogin(username, password);
        expect(await homePage.isUserLoggedIn()).toBeTruthy();



    async fill(locator:flexibleLocator, text:string):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator).fill(text, {timeout: this.defaultTimeOut});
        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


         try{
            await this.getLocator(locator).waitFor({state: 'visible', timeout});
            console.log(`waited for element to be visible`);


        await this.eleUtil.waitForElementVisible(this.imageCount);
        const imagesCount = await this.imageCount.count();
        console.log(`total number of images for ${await this.getProductHeader()} ===> ${imagesCount}`);


    private async getProductMetaData(){
         let productMetadata:string[] = await this.productMetaData.allInnerTexts();
         for(let meta of productMetadata){


    private async getProductPriceData(){
         let productPricing:string[] = await this.productPriceData.allInnerTexts();
         let productPrice:string = productPricing[0].trim();


    
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('header')).toBe('MacBook Pro');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Brand')).toBe('Apple');


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('header')).toBe('MacBook Pro');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Brand')).toBe('Apple');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Product Code')).toBe('Product 18');


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Brand')).toBe('Apple');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Product Code')).toBe('Product 18');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Reward Points')).toBe("800");


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Product Code')).toBe('Product 18');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Reward Points')).toBe("800");
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Availability')).toBe('Out Of Stock');


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Reward Points')).toBe("800");
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('Availability')).toBe('Out Of Stock');

    homePage:async({ page, baseURL}, use, testInfo) =>{


    async goToLoginPage(baseURL:string | undefined){
        await this.page.goto('/opencart/index.php?route=account/login');
    }


    async fill(locator:flexibleLocator, text:string):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator).fill(text, {timeout: this.defaultTimeOut});
        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);


    async fill(locator:flexibleLocator, text:string):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator).fill(text, {timeout: this.defaultTimeOut});
        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


        const homePage=await loginPage.doLogin(username, password);
        expect(await homePage.isUserLoggedIn()).toBeTruthy();



    async fill(locator:flexibleLocator, text:string):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator).fill(text, {timeout: this.defaultTimeOut});
        console.log(`Filled text : ${text} into element : ${locator}`);


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


    async click(locator:flexibleLocator, options?:{ force?:boolean, timeout?:number },index?:number):Promise<void>{
        await this.getLocator(locator, index).click({
            force:options?.force,


         try{
            await this.getLocator(locator).waitFor({state: 'visible', timeout});
            console.log(`waited for element to be visible`);


        await this.eleUtil.waitForElementVisible(this.imageCount);
        const imagesCount = await this.imageCount.count();
        console.log(`total number of images for ${await this.getProductHeader()} ===> ${imagesCount}`);


    private async getProductMetaData(){
         let productMetadata:string[] = await this.productMetaData.allInnerTexts();
         for(let meta of productMetadata){


    private async getProductPriceData(){
         let productPricing:string[] = await this.productPriceData.allInnerTexts();
         let productPrice:string = productPricing[0].trim();


    
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('header')).toBe('MacBook Pro');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('price')).toBe('$2,000.00');


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('header')).toBe('MacBook Pro');

    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('extaxprice')).toBe('$2,000.00');


    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('price')).toBe('$2,000.00');
    expect.soft(actualProductFullDetails.get('extaxprice')).toBe('$2,000.00');
